title: Supervise maintenance of property, machinery and equipment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise maintenance of property, machinery and equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare maintenance plan

pcs.text: Identify maintenance requirements for property, machinery and equipment from relevant information sources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify maintenance requirements for property, machinery and equipment from relevant information sources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify maintenance requirements for property, machinery and equipment from relevant information sources.

pcs.text: Check maintenance requirements against warranty, insurance agreements and indemnity provisions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check maintenance requirements against warranty, insurance agreements and indemnity provisions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check maintenance requirements against warranty, insurance agreements and indemnity provisions.

pcs.text: Identify and quantify total maintenance costs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and quantify total maintenance costs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and quantify total maintenance costs.

pcs.text: Develop a maintenance plan to promote and sustain performance and production systems in line with workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a maintenance plan to promote and sustain performance and production systems in line with workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a maintenance plan to promote and sustain performance and production systems in line with workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Establish an effective workplace communication strategy that refers to the maintenance plan and includes workplace environmental, health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish an effective workplace communication strategy that refers to the maintenance plan and includes workplace environmental, health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish an effective workplace communication strategy that refers to the maintenance plan and includes workplace environmental, health and safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare maintenance plan

elements.title: Implement maintenance plan

pcs.text: Identify, secure and include resource, supply and operational requirements in workplace budgets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, secure and include resource, supply and operational requirements in workplace budgets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, secure and include resource, supply and operational requirements in workplace budgets.

pcs.text: Communicate maintenance schedules and procedures to staff, contractors and suppliers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate maintenance schedules and procedures to staff, contractors and suppliers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate maintenance schedules and procedures to staff, contractors and suppliers.

pcs.text: Implement and schedule a maintenance plan to minimise disruption to workplace operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement and schedule a maintenance plan to minimise disruption to workplace operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement and schedule a maintenance plan to minimise disruption to workplace operations.

pcs.text: Assess potential risks with regard to staff and supply problems, and prepare contingency plans accordingly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess potential risks with regard to staff and supply problems, and prepare contingency plans accordingly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess potential risks with regard to staff and supply problems, and prepare contingency plans accordingly.

pcs.text: Align tasks required to staff capability and provide training where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Align tasks required to staff capability and provide training where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Align tasks required to staff capability and provide training where required.

pcs.text: Confirm machinery and equipment is operated to manufacturer specifications and workplace environmental and health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm machinery and equipment is operated to manufacturer specifications and workplace environmental and health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm machinery and equipment is operated to manufacturer specifications and workplace environmental and health and safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement maintenance plan

elements.title: Monitor maintenance plan

pcs.text: Monitor maintenance activities and performance against maintenance plan for efficiency and effectiveness
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor maintenance activities and performance against maintenance plan for efficiency and effectiveness?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor maintenance activities and performance against maintenance plan for efficiency and effectiveness.

pcs.text: Monitor and control workplace hazards and environmental implications associated with maintenance procedures according to health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and control workplace hazards and environmental implications associated with maintenance procedures according to health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and control workplace hazards and environmental implications associated with maintenance procedures according to health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor and control costs within workplace budget requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and control costs within workplace budget requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and control costs within workplace budget requirements.

pcs.text: Document relevant information with regard to the maintenance plan according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document relevant information with regard to the maintenance plan according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document relevant information with regard to the maintenance plan according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Ensure property, machinery and equipment are maintained in clean and safe operational condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure property, machinery and equipment are maintained in clean and safe operational condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure property, machinery and equipment are maintained in clean and safe operational condition.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Monitor maintenance plan

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
